creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 214070
Patch to upgrade GAP to 4.11.0

The attached patch brings GAP to 4.11.0.

Changelog (for the latest) at:
https://github.com/gap-system/gap/blob/master/CHANGES.md#gap-4110-february-2020

Remarks:
- it installs the standard packages set, as expected for an out-of-the-box
  installation;

- an option is available for a minimum set of packages;

- the dynamic plist has been replaced by a static one, excepted for docs,
  so that you can really see what you will get;

- there are too many shebangs to fix! SHEBANG_FILES is set to "." and this
  is a bit slow, but no better way has been found.
